goals.title: Correct Tomato Farm workout set entry UI: keep the exercise success c...
goals.objective: Correct Tomato Farm workout set entry UI: keep the exercise success criteria block and previous-record block, but make the set rows below them match the BodyCalendar reference more closely. A newly added workout exercise must start with only one set row, not four copied rows. The + row should add one new row by copying the previous row values when a previous row exists. Numeric editing should only be available after the user clicks the row set-number/type toggle or the right chevron; the minimal row itself should support completing the set with the check button. Preserve ROM input/editing only inside the expanded editor. Keep vanilla JavaScript, TDS Mobile/Seed style, no www edits, and bump sw.js cache when STATIC_ASSETS change.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: Correct Tomato Farm workout set entry UI: keep the exercise success criteria...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Newly added workout exercise starts with one visible set row, collapsed rows stay minimal, right chevron opens numeric/RIR/ROM editor, and left set number opens M/W/D/F menu.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: PASS: `node --test tests/workout-set-minimal-dom.test.js` - browser DOM test clicked the right expand button and left type button, confirmed collapsed inputCount=0, expanded fields kg/reps/rir/romPct, and menu options M/W/D/F. PASS: `node --test tests/calc.max.test.js tests/workout-test-mode-unified.test.js tests/workout-calendar-bottom-sheet.test.js` - 95 pass.

successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Set-type edge path mutates only the target set type, strips program-only meta, clears completion marker, and closes the menu after selection.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: PASS: `node --test tests/workout-set-minimal-dom.test.js` - browser DOM test selected failure set type, confirmed setType=failure, kg/reps/done preserved, wendlerRole/wendlerPct/supplementalKind/amrap removed, exerciseCompletedAt cleared, and menuOpenCount=0.

successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Adjacent workout/calendar/runtime assets still pass after the set-row correction and cache bump.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: PASS: `node --test tests/*.test.js`; PASS: `node scripts/verify-runtime-assets.mjs`; PASS: production marker verification for current cache and set UI markers after deployment.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/workout-set-minimal-correction-20260704/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/workout-set-minimal-correction-20260704/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
